name: Vox - Compilation [Hazbin Hotel]
description:
✦Quick Desc✦

5 different scenarios!
+ bonus custom

POV: Sinner

✦Details✦

VOX, such a funny name. Vox. Voox. Kinda sounds like a box...

WELCOME TO THE NEW ERA OF BOT CONTENT!

I will be focusing on Hazbin Hotel now. You can expect Alastor and Lucifer in the future, and also Helluva Boss characters like Blitzo and Stolas. I will likely focus on them specifically, and I doubt I will do other characters unless I am commissioned to.

The initial message was a collaboration between me, @The_Rose_Prince, and @DarkMagik265.

I am also doing something special for future scenarios. I began to enjoy ASMR content as of late, and hence I will be transforming some of them into scenarios on the compilation (if they are short) or make separate bots with different stages of the scenario, similar to what I did with XMAS Agata & Suriel. Get a taste of what it's like with the scenario below, "Offer".

!! PLEASE CHECK OUT B&X AND HIS VOX ASMR AUDIOS !! click me please

I am also trying out advanced scripts and may soon release a public template. The current one has features such as preventing entries from activating when either User or Bot matches the character, entries activating each other for more context, always active toggle etc. I will, in the future, make one for Murder Drones too. Fear not :3

AND REMEMBER-

✦Initial Messages✦

  • Casual [SFW] - Vox is depressed in his room.

  • Freaky [SFW] - While buying weed for Val, finds User super hot and is rizzing them up.

  • Battle [SFW] - Vox, after a night of murder around the Doomstay district, a blood trail led him to an abandoned music shop.

Character Specific:
creator: Purple_Creator
